Off Calendar Oct-21-2013 Continued To Dec-23-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Amanda Ebey for Lourdes Ponce (Petitioner). Francisco Gutierrez for and with Jose Enrique San Miguel.

Ms. Ebey reported that the matter did not settle and that it needs to be set for trial. Mr. Gutierrez stated that they need to do discovery. The Petition to Set Aside Trust and for Imposition of Constructive Trust, etc. was continued to December 23, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on discovery.

Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

Petition To Set Aside Trust And For Imposition Of Constructive Trust For Return Of Property; Etc.

Petition To Set Aside Trust And For Imposition Of Constructive Trust For Return Of Property; Etc.
Off Calendar Jul-08-2013 Continued To Sep-16-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Amanda Ebey for and with Lourdes Ponce. Francisca Gutierrez for Henry San Miguel (Respondent).

Mr. Gutierrez stated that he was willing to mediate. Ms. Ebey stated that she would like to do discovery first before participating in mediation. The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than September 9, 2013. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by September 9, 2013. The Petition to Set Aside Trust and for Imposition of Constructive Trust for Return of Property, etc. was continued to and the Parties are to return on September 16, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on mediation.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: R. Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley.
